name: Pasta Cannelini
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta to your desired doneness and drain it, keeping it warm.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat until hot.
3. Add the onions and garlic; cook and stir for about 6 minutes or until the onions are tender.
4. Add the tomatoes, beans, and oregano to the skillet; mix well.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce the heat and let it simmer for 5-10 minutes to allow the flavors to blend together.
7. Serve the sauce over the pasta.
